message.content:
[cron:2c855a3e-6b66-43f5-98a1-2a9293f7a527 PG-Notion Batch Sync (hourly)] Run: bash /Users/ainchorsoc2a/.openclaw/workspace/scripts/pg-to-notion-sync.sh --batch

This syncs all tickets where notion_sync.status != 'synced'. It is self-healing — catches tickets whose event-driven sync failed. Process each ticket, apply rate limiting, update notion_sync metadata on success.

If errors: log to /Users/ainchorsoc2a/.openclaw/workspace/state/pg-notion-sync-errors.json
If 3 consecutive failures for same ticket: log to /Users/ainchorsoc2a/.openclaw/workspace/state/pg-notion-sync-dlq.json
Current time: Saturday, July 18th, 2026 - 3:09 PM (Asia/Kuala_Lumpur)
Reference UTC: 2026-07-18 07:09 UTC
